prompt: I want to add a RACI matrix view to ProcessFlow — right now we only have swimlane rendering. The RACI should show which roles are Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, and Informed for each step in a process.

assertions.text: A PRD file exists in outputs with RACI in the filename
PRD contains a Problem Statement section
PRD contains testable acceptance criteria with checkbox items
PRD breaks work into numbered implementation phases
PRD explicitly defines what is out of scope
A ROADMAP.md file exists in outputs
Roadmap references or links to the PRD document
Discovery or clarifying questions were asked before writing the PRD
